creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
I tried a test-build on a 11a system with some ports already installed
and in a 11a poudriere system. It fails in both cases, see

http://people.freebsd.org/~pi/logs/net-ns3-11amd64.txt

Testbuilds on 10.2a+i and 9.3a still running.

Nikola, if you find the time to update the shar to 3.24, that would
be nice 8-}
